entries.source: Treat this as a stateful, evidence-aware historical simulation with a passport, travel advisory, world view, and choices.
entries.value: Obravnavajte to kot zgodovinsko simulacijo, ki ohranja stanje in upošteva dokaze, s potnim listom, potovalnim opozorilom, pogledom na svet in izbirami.

entries.source: Treating a popular market as an attractive market.
entries.value: Obravnavanje priljubljenega trga kot privlačnega trga.

entries.source: Treating religion as private opinion rather than public order would sound strange and possibly dangerous.
entries.value: Obravnavanje vere kot zasebnega mnenja namesto javnega reda bi zvenelo čudno in morda nevarno.

entries.source: Treats revenue growth as value growth.
entries.value: Rast prihodkov obravnava kot rast vrednosti.

entries.source: Treats style as a substitute for reasoning.
entries.value: Slog obravnava kot nadomestek za sklepanje.

entries.source: Trial talk travels through civic spaces
entries.value: Govor o sojenju se širi po javnih prostorih

entries.source: Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Najprej poskusite: davek na kavo zviša stroške prodajalcev. Kaj bi morali pričakovati, preden vidite graf?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Najprej poskusite: vrednost se takoj po klicu fetch zabeleži kot undefined. Kaj je najkoristneje najprej preveriti?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Najprej poskusite: če prodaja zraste za 20 %, marže pa se skrčijo in potrebe po zalogah poskočijo, kaj se verjetno zgodi s prostim denarnim tokom?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Najprej poskusite: pri dostavi hrane, katero silo najverjetneje okrepijo kupci, ki primerjajo cene med aplikacijami?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Najprej poskusite: kateri dokaz bolje pokaže, da razumete nov pojem?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Najprej poskusite: kateri stavek je običajno treba popraviti, ko so dokazi prisotni, odstavek pa še vedno deluje neprepričljivo?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Poskusite ta okvir: "Ko se ___ spremeni, se ___ spremeni, ker ___."

entries.source: Turn material into a deck you actually test yourself on.
entries.value: Gradivo spremenite v predstavitev, s katero se dejansko sami preverjate.

entries.source: Turn the weak spot into a quiz, flashcards, or a follow-up chat.
entries.value: Šibko točko spremenite v kviz, učne kartice ali nadaljevalni klepet.

entries.source: Understand basics, solve problems, revise fast...
entries.value: Razumeti osnove, rešiti naloge, hitro ponoviti...

entries.source: Understand photosynthesis, write an essay plan...
Understanding means you can predict, explain, and use an idea in a new situation. Reading is only the start.
entries.value: Razumevanje pomeni, da lahko z idejo napovedujete, jo razložite in uporabite v novi situaciji. Branje je šele začetek.
Neimenovane sodne osebe so sestavljeni liki

entries.source: Unresolved until the historical setting is specified.
entries.value: Nerazrešeno, dokler ni določeno zgodovinsko okolje.

entries.source: Unverified details must stay visibly uncertain
entries.value: Nepreverjene podrobnosti morajo ostati vidno negotove

entries.source: Use only as the last resort.
Use the dossier to see what incentives, fears, allies, and enemies shape the reply.
entries.value: Uporabite dosje, da vidite, katere spodbude, strahovi, zavezniki in sovražniki oblikujejo odgovor.

entries.source: Use visible sections: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, Next action.
entries.value: Uporabite vidne razdelke: Skupni izdelek, Prispevek UI, Poteza uporabnika, Komentarji v vrstici, Dnevnik odločitev, Odprta vprašanja, Naslednji korak.

entries.source: User's purpose: help them choose sharp opening questions.
entries.value: Namen uporabnika: pomoč pri izbiri ostrih uvodnih vprašanj.

entries.source: Value = forecast free cash flows discounted for risk + discounted terminal value.
entries.value: Vrednost = napovedani prosti denarni tokovi, diskontirani za tveganje + diskontirana terminalna vrednost.
Sistemi mestnih četrti so oblikovali urbano življenje

entries.source: West Market during the Tang dynasty
entries.value: Zahodna tržnica v času dinastije Tang

entries.source: Wet dust, shouted rumors, smoke, prayer calls, and the metallic anxiety of a city under pressure.
entries.value: Moker prah, vzklikane govorice, dim, klici k molitvi in kovinska tesnoba mesta pod pritiskom.

entries.source: What are we trying to build, solve, learn, or improve?
entries.value: Kaj poskušamo zgraditi, rešiti, se naučiti ali izboljšati?

entries.source: What do you want to ask, test, learn, or confront?
entries.value: Kaj želite vprašati, preizkusiti, izvedeti ali izzvati?

entries.source: What do you want to understand or be able to do?
entries.value: Kaj želite razumeti ali znati narediti?

entries.source: What kind of journey is this?
What they value, defend, miss, or refuse.
entries.value: Kaj cenijo, zagovarjajo, spregledajo ali zavračajo.

entries.source: What would you like to be quizzed on today?
Where and when do you want to go?
Whether one encounter changes a crowd's direction
entries.value: Ali lahko eno srečanje spremeni smer množice

entries.source: Who pressures them, supports them, or threatens them.
entries.value: Kdo nanje pritiska, jih podpira ali jim grozi.
Rutine v delavnicah so verjetne rekonstrukcije

entries.source: Write a 4 sentence paragraph with a claim, evidence, explanation, and consequence.
entries.value: Napišite odstavek s 4 stavki, ki vsebuje trditev, dokaz, razlago in posledico.

entries.source: Write a short answer. The app checks the link, not polish.
entries.value: Napišite kratek odgovor. Aplikacija preveri povezavo, ne slogovne izpiljenosti.

entries.source: Write the core link in one sentence before moving on.
entries.value: Pred nadaljevanjem v enem stavku napišite osnovno povezavo.

entries.source: Write your answer, even if it is rough.
entries.value: Napišite svoj odgovor, tudi če je grob.

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Da. Dokazi potrebujejo razlago, sicer se argument zdi nedokončan.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Da. Povezali ste prodajo, marže in obratni kapital, namesto da bi eno vrstico obravnavali kot celoten model.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Najprej dodate ideje, da lahko učni sopotnik gradi z vami.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
entries.value: Definicijo lahko prepoznate, ko se pojavi.

entries.source: You can use it correctly in a new example.
entries.value: Pravilno ga lahko uporabite v novem primeru.

entries.source: You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Podali ste dovolj vzročne povezave za nadaljevanje.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Zdaj imate začetni zemljevid. Obnovimo šibke točke.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Za ta korak imate dokaze. Za nadaljevanje uporabite Nadaljuj.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.
entries.value: Navedli ste spremenjen vnos in ga povezali z rezultatom. To je poteza, ki jo vadimo.

entries.source: You read three explanations about it.
entries.value: Prebrali ste tri razlage o tem.

entries.source: Your answer controls the next question.
Your answer needs a clearer because-link: what changed, what it affected, and why.
entries.value: Vaš odgovor potrebuje jasnejšo vzročno povezavo: kaj se je spremenilo, na kaj je vplivalo in zakaj.

entries.source: Your buddy works beside you: you contribute ideas, the app organizes them, and both of you checkpoint progress.
entries.value: Vaš učni sopotnik dela ob vas: vi prispevate ideje, aplikacija jih organizira, skupaj pa preverjata napredek.

entries.source: Your status controls language, money, access, danger, and what questions sound natural.
entries.value: Vaš status določa jezik, denar, dostop, nevarnost in to, katera vprašanja zvenijo naravno.

entries.source: Curious about absolutely anything? Ask, explore, and go deeper at your pace. Your buddy makes ideas practical, memorable, and easy to build on. Try: "Explain how the stock market actually works."
entries.value: Vas zanima res karkoli? Vprašajte, raziskujte in se poglobite v svojem tempu. Vaš učni sopotnik ideje naredi praktične, zapomnljive in primerne za nadgradnjo. Poskusite: "Razloži, kako delniški trg dejansko deluje."

entries.source: What are you curious about today?
Ask any question and learn through clear explanations, examples, follow-up prompts, and patient AI tutoring.
entries.value: Postavite katerokoli vprašanje in se učite z jasnimi razlagami, primeri, nadaljnjimi pozivi in potrpežljivim mentorstvom z UI.

entries.source: Curious learners, students, parents, and self-taught builders who want a friendly place to start.
entries.value: Radovedni učenci, študenti, starši in samouki ustvarjalci, ki želijo prijazen začetek.

entries.source: Instead of dropping a long answer, inspir helps you choose a simpler foundation, a deeper route, or a practical example.
entries.value: Namesto da izpiše dolg odgovor, vam inspir pomaga izbrati preprostejši temelj, globljo pot ali praktičen primer.

entries.source: Leave with a useful next question
A guided reasoning chamber for disciplined questioning
entries.value: Voden prostor za sklepanje z discipliniranim spraševanjem

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Pojem, argument, problem, besedilo ali odločitev spremenite v osredotočeno verigo vprašanj. Vaš učni sopotnik prisluhne vsakemu odgovoru, začrta predpostavke in vrzeli ter vas usmeri k vaši končni sintezi. Poskusite: "Pomagaj mi razumeti oportunitetni strošek."

entries.source: Answer the active question in your own words
entries.value: Na aktivno vprašanje odgovorite s svojimi besedami

entries.source: Learn through focused questions, hints, and reflection instead of passive answer reading.
entries.value: Učite se z osredotočenimi vprašanji, namigi in razmislekom namesto s pasivnim branjem odgovorov.

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Učenci, ki želijo temo premisliti, preveriti predpostavke in zgraditi trajno razumevanje.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Mentor zastavi eno vprašanje naenkrat, počaka na vaše sklepanje in sintetizira šele, ko poskusite.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model
Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Ali naj podjetje vstopi na ta trg?

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Gradite, kritizirajte in se učite v skupni delovni sobi

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Odprite skupni delovni prostor s sodelavcem z UI. Ustvarite grob delovni izdelek, izmenjajte urejanja, izzovite šibke točke, zabeležite odločitve in odidite s konkretnim napredkom.

entries.source: Add your next edit, decision, question, or handoff
entries.value: Dodajte naslednje urejanje, odločitev, vprašanje ali predajo

entries.source: Open a shared workspace with an AI collaborator. Make a rough artifact, trade edits, challenge weak spots, log decisions, and leave with concrete progress.
entries.value: Odprite skupni delovni prostor s sodelavcem z UI. Ustvarite grob delovni izdelek, izmenjajte urejanja, izzovite šibke točke, zabeležite odločitve in odidite s konkretnim napredkom.

entries.source: Learners exploring foundations topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Učenci, ki raziskujejo temeljne teme in želijo praktično usmerjanje namesto splošnega okenca za odgovore.

entries.source: This mode is tuned for collaborative instruction with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Ta način je prilagojen sodelovalnemu poučevanju z lastnimi pozivi, primeri in učnim tokom.

entries.source: Build, critique, and learn in a shared workroom
entries.value: Graditi, kritizirati in se učiti v skupni delovni sobi

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal
Build a photosynthesis explanation with me
Adaptive lessons that make you do
entries.value: Prilagodljive lekcije, ki vas spodbudijo k delu

entries.source: Learn by doing, seeing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery. The app builds a live lesson canvas around your goal instead of turning instruction into a long chat. Try: "Teach me financial modeling."
entries.value: Učite se z delom, opazovanjem, primerjanjem, popravljanjem in dokazovanjem obvladanja. Aplikacija okoli vašega cilja zgradi živo učno platno, namesto da poučevanje spremeni v dolg klepet. Poskusite: "Nauči me finančnega modeliranja."

entries.source: What would you like to learn today?
entries.value: Kaj bi se danes radi naučili?

entries.source: Learn by doing, comparing, repairing, and proving mastery with an AI tutor that turns your goal into an active lesson.
entries.value: Učite se z delom, primerjanjem, popravljanjem in dokazovanjem obvladanja z učiteljem z UI, ki vaš cilj spremeni v aktivno lekcijo.

entries.source: Learners who want a guided lesson canvas with examples, checks, and active practice instead of a long chat answer.
entries.value: Učenci, ki želijo vodeno učno platno s primeri, preverjanji in aktivno vadbo namesto dolgega klepetalnega odgovora.

entries.source: The mode keeps the session interactive, moving between explanation, try-it steps, checks, and repairs.
entries.value: Način ohranja sejo interaktivno in prehaja med razlago, koraki za poskus, preverjanji in popravki.

entries.source: Help me learn supply and demand
entries.value: Pomagaj mi razumeti ponudbo in povpraševanje

entries.source: 10 MCQs on any topic with a score
entries.value: 10 vprašanj z več možnimi odgovori o poljubni temi z rezultatom

entries.source: Pick any topic and face a focused 10-question multiple-choice quiz. You answer one question at a time, get instant feedback, and finish with a score and review.
entries.value: Izberite katerokoli temo in se lotite osredotočenega kviza z 10 vprašanji z več možnimi odgovori. Odgovarjate na eno vprašanje naenkrat, takoj dobite povratne informacije in končate z rezultatom ter pregledom.

entries.source: What topic shall we put you to the test on?
entries.value: Iz katere teme naj vas preizkusimo?

entries.source: Generate a focused multiple-choice quiz on any subject and review explanations after each answer.
entries.value: Ustvarite osredotočen kviz z več možnimi odgovori o katerikoli temi in po vsakem odgovoru preglejte razlage.

entries.source: Learners who want active recall, quick practice, and a score they can improve.
entries.value: Učenci, ki želijo aktivni priklic, hitro vadbo in rezultat, ki ga lahko izboljšajo.

entries.source: The quiz mode hides answers until you respond, then turns every miss into a review point.
entries.value: Način kviza skrije odgovore, dokler ne odgovorite, nato pa vsako napako spremeni v točko za ponovitev.

entries.source: Receive a temporal passport, clear a travel advisory, then explore a specific historical society through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Prejmite časovni potni list, preglejte potovalno opozorilo, nato raziščite določeno zgodovinsko družbo skozi prizor, zemljevid, časovnico, ljudi, pravila, inventar in dokaze.

entries.source: What do you do next in this world?
entries.value: Kaj v tem svetu naredite naslednje?

entries.source: Build a temporal passport, clear the travel advisory, and explore a historical world through scene, map, timeline, people, rules, inventory, and evidence.
entries.value: Ustvarite časovni potni list, preglejte potovalno opozorilo in raziščite zgodovinski svet skozi prizor, zemljevid, časovnico, ljudi, pravila, inventar in dokaze.

entries.source: History learners who want a specific society, identity, and set of constraints rather than a generic period summary.
entries.value: Učenci zgodovine, ki želijo določeno družbo, identiteto in nabor omejitev namesto splošnega povzetka obdobja.

entries.source: The journey stays anchored in state and evidence: what is known, what is reconstructed, what is speculative, and what your identity can realistically access.
entries.value: Potovanje ostaja zasidrano v stanju in dokazih: kaj je znano, kaj je rekonstruirano, kaj je špekulativno in do česa lahko vaša identiteta realistično dostopa.

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Stopite v pogovor z zgodovinsko osebnostjo. Postavljajte vprašanja, izzivajte ideje in slišite svet skozi njeno dobo, vrednote in omejitve.

entries.source: Which historical figure would you like to meet?
entries.value: Katero zgodovinsko osebnost bi radi srečali?

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Postavljajte vprašanja, izzivajte ideje in se učite zgodovine skozi utemeljene pogovore z javnimi osebnostmi iz preteklosti.

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Učenci, ki želijo razumeti ljudi, izbire in ideje v zgodovinskem kontekstu.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Aplikacija loči pogovor v vlogi od kratkih kontekstnih opomb o zapisih in negotovosti.

entries.source: Name a real or fictional personality and debate them on any topic. The AI channels their public style and worldview while keeping the debate fair.
entries.value: Navedite resnično ali izmišljeno osebnost in z njo razpravljajte o katerikoli temi. UI povzema njen javni slog in svetovni nazor, hkrati pa ohranja razpravo pošteno.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: S kom želite razpravljati in o čem?

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Vadite argumentacijo z debato o izbrani temi z javno ali izmišljeno osebnostjo.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Učenci, ki želijo živahno vadbo debate z zapomnljivimi glasovi in poštenim izzivom.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Debata uporablja javni slog in svetovni nazor, ne da bi se pretvarjala, da pozna zasebna prepričanja.

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Debatiraj o podnebni politiki z Greto Thunberg
Debatiraj o ambiciji s Stevom Jobsom

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Zagovarjajte obe strani in izostrite mišljenje

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Izberite katerokoli temo in se spustite v pravo debato. Izberite stran, sprejmite izzive in se naučite oblikovati boljše argumente.
Katera je vaša današnja tema za debato?

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Debatirajte o katerikoli temi, sprejmite izzive, primerjajte trditve in se naučite oblikovati močnejše argumente.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Študenti, debaterji, pisci in radovedni učenci, ki želijo močnejše sklepanje.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Trener poda en močan protiargument naenkrat in spremlja trditve, ki so pomembne.
